title: Dungeon Wraiths for the Graveyard
description: replaces the more generic wraith design in the graveyard mod with the mc dungeons enemy of the same name
body:
Turns the Wraith enemies from [The Graveyard](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-graveyard-fabric) to [the enemy of the same name](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:Wraith) from Minecraft Dungeons.
Has custom animations, and uses sounds from dungeons as well
